name: dudu
description: VC due diligence skills: founder checks, market/problem persona self-play, customer discovery, competitive landscape, and market sizing.

interface.shortDescription: VC due diligence workflow for early-stage deals
interface.longDescription: Run end-to-end early-stage diligence on a deal: founder checks (with optional discovery), market/product/problem persona self-play, your-own customer discovery prep and debrief, competitive landscape, and bottom-up market sizing. Each skill produces a citation-backed markdown artifact under deals/<slug>/, stitched into a final investment memo.
defaultPrompt: I'm evaluating a new deal. Help me run dudu:diligence on it.
Run dudu:founder-check on the founders of this company.
